This app is very unreliable—slow, frequently crashes, and fails to sync properly. Transactions don’t reflect accurately; I transferred money that was deducted but never received, with no record in recent activity. It often stops working and takes too long to update. Reinstalling doesn’t help. You even have to visit a branch for it to start working, which is unacceptable today. The problem is even worse outside Ethiopia.
